title: spiraea alpina var. alpina
intro: Spiraea alpina var. alpina, also known as Alpine meadowsweet, is a plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Spiraea alpina var. alpina include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
